subcodes.first_line: O ye beloved of God and manifestations and dawning-places of His infinite bounties, may your Beloved shower upon you from His horizon [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای احبای الهی و مظاهر و مطالع مواهب غیرمتناهی افاض علیکم محبوبکم من افقه
subcodes.subjects: @Manifestation of God as gardener; cultivator, @bringing forth results; fruit, @spiritual transformation, @praise and encouragement, @education and the development of capacity
